content.full_text:
September 10,1991


Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA    95804-0807

I am not running for a renewal of my position as a member of the Board of Directors
of the Quien Hills Water District.  I have several questions about filing my
"Leaving Office Statement" Form 730.  Based on the information that the election is
November 5, 1991, the November meeting of the Water District is November 7, 1991 and
the December meeting is on December 5, 1991, my questions are as follows:

1. If the new director is sworn into office on 11/7/91, when is my
   Form 730 due?

2. If the new director is sworn into office on 12/5/91, but my last
   meeting (providing there are no special meetings) is 11/7/91, when
   is my Form 730 due?

3. After leaving office, is there any prohibitions I must observe that
   would involve conflict of interest?

4. Who supplies the blank Form 730 for my "Leaving Office Statement"?

I appreciate your help in answering these questions.

P.S.: Please send any other
information that you feel may          Sincerely,
be relevant, Thank you.  [signature]
                                       Martin Koppel
                                       P.O. Box 4055
                                       Lancaster, CA  93539

                                       (805) 945-4628

[This image appears to be a very faint or low-contrast document scan. While there are visible text elements scattered throughout the page, they are too faint and illegible for me to accurately transcribe with confidence. The document appears to have multiple lines of text in the upper-middle portion of the page and what might be a table or structured content on the right side, but the specific words and characters cannot be reliably made out.]
